cmd:
cd /root/Lyudmula && ./venv/bin/python3 -c "
from datetime import datetime
from zoneinfo import ZoneInfo
from google.oauth2 import service_account
from googleapiclient.discovery import build

creds = service_account.Credentials.from_service_account_file('google_credentials.json', scopes=['https://www.googleapis.com/auth/calendar'])
service = build('calendar', 'v3', credentials=creds)

result = service.events().list(calendarId='lydazab@gmail.com', timeMin='2026-05-28T00:00:00+03:00', timeMax='2026-05-28T23:59:59+03:00', singleEvents=True, orderBy='startTime').execute()
events = result.get('items', [])

if not events:
    print('Четвер 28.05 — подій немає, весь день вільний')
else:
    print('Зайняті слоти в четвер 28.05:')
    for e in events:
        start = e['start'].get('dateTime', e['start'].get('date',''))
        end = e['end'].get('dateTime', e['end'].get('date',''))
        title = e.get('summary','Без назви')
        if 'T' in start:
            s = datetime.fromisoformat(start).strftime('%H:%M')
            en = datetime.fromisoformat(end).strftime('%H:%M')
            print(f'  {s}-{en}: {title}')
        else:
            print(f'  Весь день: {title}')
"
